title: Delicate Turkish Lamb Doner Kebab
description: A tender and flavorful lamb doner kebab dish featuring clear honey and a blend of spices, perfect for a date night, this low-sodium-friendly recipe is made with grassy notes and a knead technique.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine lamb shoulder, clear honey, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Knead the mixture for 10 minutes until it becomes tender and well combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a vertical broiler or grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the lamb mixture onto skewers, if using, and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked through.
Let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Serve the lamb doner kebab in a pita bread with parsley, and your choice of toppings.
Drizzle with additional clear honey, if desired.
Cook the pita bread by grilling or toasting it for 2-3 minutes, until it is lightly browned and crispy.
